note: Design/prompt binding (no code yet — implementation is a later, gated step). Each construct maps 1:1 to a spec/prereg site with a PRESENT criterion an independent auditor can check now, and a code site later.

constructs.name: same model
constructs.site: one MODEL constant (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B :8005) for all conditions
constructs.present_criterion: no condition uses a different model/endpoint

constructs.name: same system prompt
constructs.site: one frozen SYSTEM string shared by CONTROL/SWEEP/RANDOM

constructs.name: same task
constructs.site: the task = the frame's own current-task; identical user framing across conditions
constructs.present_criterion: task text identical; no condition adds/removes task

constructs.name: same source
constructs.site: full HBB-30 t0_stuck_frame present in every condition
constructs.present_criterion: the complete source appears in all conditions; regions are subsets, not replacements
constructs.invalid_if: a condition truncates/augments the source with new text

constructs.name: same evidence + authority policy
constructs.site: no evidence/authority rule injected by any condition
constructs.present_criterion: no condition adds an evidence/provenance/authority instruction
constructs.invalid_if: a condition injects an evidence/authority rule

constructs.name: same decoding + context budget
constructs.site: one temp/seed-scheme/max_tokens; center line adds only a few tokens present in BOTH SWEEP and RANDOM
constructs.present_criterion: decoding params identical; the only token delta is the center line, matched between SWEEP and RANDOM
constructs.invalid_if: decoding differs, or the token delta differs between SWEEP and RANDOM

constructs.name: the ONLY variable = observation center
constructs.present_criterion: CONTROL has no line; SWEEP/RANDOM append exactly one line of the SAME template differing only in the span text
constructs.invalid_if: any other text differs across conditions

constructs.name: mechanical region formation
constructs.site: regex sentence split of t0_stuck_frame; regions verbatim; SWEEP over ALL regions
constructs.present_criterion: regions come from a mechanical split with no field labels, no answer, no human pick; every region is swept
constructs.invalid_if: a region is hand-selected or answer-derived, or SWEEP omits a region

constructs.name: no answer / semantic injection in the center line
constructs.site: center-line template = '<span>. Keep the same task and the same rules.'
constructs.present_criterion: the line contains ONLY a verbatim source span + the fixed neutral suffix; NO rubric-family token (evidence/evidence-status/DECLARED/UNVERIFIED/SUPERSESSION/provenance), NO 'question/reframe/challenge/premise/audit', NO HBB-30 answer vocabulary; violates none of the packet's own `exclusions`. Suffix excludes the word 'evidence' (N1 fix).
constructs.invalid_if: any forbidden/rubric-family term or instruction appears

constructs.name: random control matched
constructs.site: RANDOM spans = contiguous substrings matched to R0..R3 lengths, seed-fixed offsets, same center-line format
constructs.present_criterion: same count and lengths as SWEEP regions; only the span offset differs; deterministic

constructs.name: outcome scorer-only, condition-blind, non-author
constructs.site: rubric goes only to the scorer; generator blind; Claude excluded; scorer blind to condition
constructs.present_criterion: no rubric term reaches the generator; scorer sees outputs without condition labels; Claude does not score
constructs.invalid_if: generator sees the rubric, or scorer sees condition labels, or Claude scores

constructs.name: confound separation
constructs.present_criterion: CONTROL isolates line-presence; RANDOM isolates repetition/emphasis; SWEEP-vs-RANDOM isolates center-coherence
constructs.invalid_if: the design cannot separate center-shift from repetition

target_blindness: no known-answer, no rubric term, no human-picked region reaches the generator; regions are a mechanical sweep of ALL sentences; RANDOM is seed-fixed.
claim_ceiling: observation-center shift can alter produced discriminating observations under a preserved reasoning system; nothing more.
acceptance_gate: independent construct audit confirms I1-I6, C1, R1, N1-N2, O1, K1 hold in the spec/prereg (and later in code) BEFORE any run.
status: DESIGN BINDING DRAFTED — awaiting independent construct audit; implementation + run held.
